other_findings.finding: VE1 cells are described as 'adult brain vascular endothelial subset enriched for canonical endothelial markers'
VE1 has high expression of tight junction protein (CLDN5)
VE1 spatially localizes to capillary and arteriolar vascular compartments

evidence_quotes.quote: VE1 adult brain vascular endothelial subset enriched for canonical endothelial markers (CLDN5, FLT1, VWF)
VE1: high expression of tight junction protein CLDN5
VE1 spatial localization: capillary and arteriolar compartments
